manifest.claimBoundary: Synthetic public demonstration only. No external audit, production certification, live settlement, value movement, or AGI/ASI attainment claim.

curriculum.source: accepted synthetic Evidence Docket + replay-ready claim boundary
curriculum.objective: Generate harder public-safe follow-on missions only when they are learnable, proofable, validator-bounded, replayable, and safe to inspect.

admittedMission.name: Proof-gated harder mission
admittedMission.reason: clear validator, bounded risk, replay path, challenge window, and reuse objective

candidates.name: Narrative moonshot
candidates.reason: interesting language, no validator, no replay path, broad claim boundary

candidates.name: Promising task idea
candidates.reason: useful but validator requirements and acceptance tests are incomplete

candidates.name: High-impact escalation
candidates.reason: impact is high, but risk boundary and rollback plan are not sufficient

candidates.name: Proof-gated harder mission
candidates.reason: clear validator, bounded risk, replay path, challenge window, and reuse objective

certificate.nextMission: Mission 002 candidate — harder, replayable, bounded, public-safe follow-on mission

filterReport.rule: Interestingness is allocation pressure only. It is not admission authority.
filterReport.reason: Mission seeds must be useful, learnable, proofable, bounded, replayable, and challengeable.

entries.reason: interesting language, no validator, no replay path, broad claim boundary
entries.memoryRule: preserve as negative example, no mission authority
